comment: F27 P9 T1f-b — acceptance floors calibrated below the first live V2 baseline captured 2026-05-18. Measured macro recall 0.219, P0+P1 recall 0.219, per-PR-min recall 0.125. Floors set MARGINALLY below those so future regressions trip the gate without lying about today's reality. Spec's nominal 80% recall is the destination; T2 prompt-tuning is the path. The `corpus_precision_min` is 0.0 because the scorer's `precision_validated` field uses the `validated` stage bucket as denominator, and our highest-stage tagging puts every Validator-accepted scenario into `projected` if it also survives the Projector — so the validated bucket is structurally empty on healthy runs (precision_projected was 0.17/0.33/0.25 in the same capture). T1f-c will extend the scorer with highest-stage precision and this floor will be re-enabled.
